title: Valkyrian Netherite Reforged
description: If you want to add trims to your armor download Valkyrian Netherite Reforged V2 but if you want just tools to be trimmed then this one is better!
body:
This resource pack make netherite tools look much better than before. This resource pack can be used in servers as well as in singleplayer. Aditionally i added a sculk totem of undying that is half infected that look super gorgeous.

  ――――――――――――――Loved the texture pack? Check out more [here](https://modrinth.com/user/Orenxo)――――――――――――――

➙Join our discord server for fun community and get updates.

➙Follow my projects on modrinth.
